/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/UitraPong.dir/main.cpp.o -o ../bin/UitraPong  ../_deps/sfml-build/lib/libsfml-graphics.a Ball/libBall.a Players/libPlayers.a PlayerMoveUpCommand/libPlayerMoveUpCommand.a Players/libPlayers.a ../_deps/sfml-build/lib/libsfml-graphics.a ../_deps/sfml-build/lib/libsfml-window.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libX11.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libXrandr.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libXcursor.so ../_deps/sfml-build/lib/libsfml-system.a -lpthread -lrt /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGL.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libudev.so -ldl /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libfreetype.so
